住.mnemonics: Visualize 'su' as someone ('su') living in a house ('juu') in the countryside.

正.mnemonics: Think of 'shou' as being correct ('shou') and fair ('sei') in every 'tada' decision.

年.mnemonics: Remember 'nen' as the passing of a year ('nen') marked by the change of seasons ('toshi').

売.mnemonics: Visualize 'u' as selling ('u') a valuable item ('bai') at a bazaar.

買.mnemonics: Think of 'ka' as buying ('ka') a valuable item ('bai') at a bazaar.

町.mnemonics: Remember 'machi' as a lively town ('machi') with tall buildings ('chou').

長.mnemonics: Visualize 'naga' as a long ('naga') road stretching into the distance ('chou').

道.mnemonics: Think of 'michi' as finding your way ('michi') home along a winding path ('dou').

雪.mnemonics: Remember 'yuki' as snow ('yuki') covering the ground in a serene landscape ('setsu').

立.mnemonics: Visualize 'ta' as someone ('ta') standing ('ri') tall and proud.

自.mnemonics: Think of 'ji' as taking care of oneself ('ji') by eating a balanced diet.

夜.mnemonics: Remember 'yoru' as the time when the moon ('yo') and stars ('ya') light up the night sky.

朝.mnemonics: Visualize 'asa' as waking up early in the morning ('asa') to the sound of birds chirping ('chou').

持.mnemonics: Think of 'mo' as holding ('mo') onto a valuable item ('ji') tightly.
